    <item>
      <title>NBA teams finally know story behind Darryn Peterson's cramping issues</title>
      <description>Few prospects in recent NBA history could equal Kansas' Darryn Peterson. But constant cramping, injuries, and questions about his love for the game might cost him the No. 1 spot in June's 2026 NBA Draft.</description>
      <pubDate>09 May 2026 17:51:33 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/nba_teams_finally_know_story_behind_darryn_petersons_cramping_issues/s1_13132_43823896</link>

        <media:credit> Kirby Lee-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Kansas Jayhawks guard Darryn Peterson. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Winners, losers from NBA playoffs: Villanova alums take down Philly</title>
      <description>When the second-round series between the Philadelphia 76ers and New York Knicks moved to the City of Brotherly Love, three Knicks who spent their college years in Philly stepped up.</description>

    <item>
      <title>Lakers HC JJ Redick sends message after Game 3 loss to Thunder</title>
      <description>LeBron James and the Los Angeles Lakers fell again to the Oklahoma City Thunder in Game 3 of the Western Conference semifinals on Saturday with a 131-108 final score, and Lakers head coach JJ Redick isn't happy about it.</description>
      <pubDate>10 May 2026 00:21:12 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/lakers_hc_jj_redick_sends_message_after_game_3_loss_to_thunder/s1_13132_43825720</link>

      </media:content>

    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Cade Cunningham sends critical message after Pistons' Game 3 loss to Cavaliers</title>
      <description>The Detroit Pistons were hoping to go 3-0 in their series against the Cleveland Cavaliers on Saturday in the Eastern Conference semifinals, but instead, the Cavs gave their hometown crowd a show in a 116-109 victory.</description>
      <pubDate>09 May 2026 23:41:25 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/cade_cunningham_sends_critical_message_after_pistons_game_3_loss_to_cavaliers/s1_13132_43825752</link>

        <media:credit> Ken Blaze-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Detroit Pistons guard Cade Cunningham (2) drives to the basket against Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) during the first quarter of game three in the second round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Rocket Arena. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Detroit Pistons</category>
      <category>Cleveland Cavaliers</category>

    </item>
    <item>
      <title>LeBron James, Lakers will have to make NBA history to win series vs. Thunder</title>
      <description>After Saturday's loss in Game 3 of the Western Conference semifinals, LeBron James and the Los Angeles Lakers are now down 3-0 in their series against the Oklahoma City Thunder, and to say it's an uphill battle to climb their way out of this hole is an understatement.</description>
      <pubDate>10 May 2026 00:08:53 -0400</pubDate>

        <media:title> Los Angeles Lakers forward LeBron James (23) looks for a foul call during the first quarter of Game 3 of the second round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs against the Oklahoma City Thunder at Crypto.com Arena.  </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>

      <description>How many of the active players to hit at least four three's off of the bench multiple times in the same NBA Playoff run can you name in five minutes?</description>
